execReport:
Overall Status — Portfolio remains healthy with 22 active initiatives and 28 of 68 completed (41%). Delivery momentum is strong this week, with five items reaching Train Testing. The main constraint is now on AEGON's side: 11 initiatives are Pending ASP, representing half of the active portfolio.
This Week's Progress

Five initiatives advanced to Train Testing: #17 (Pré-Autorizações e Reembolsos), #18 (Subscrição Clínica FHnet), #26 (Acesso Detalhe da Factura), #55 (ASP Change Contact Method) and #56 (ASP SMS Token)
#23 (Autorização — Histórico de Utilização FH NET) progressed from Dev Testing to Dev Approved
#43 (Processo de Recuperação da Dívida) was moved from In Progress to On Hold pending alignment

Key Actions Required

Prioritise the 11 initiatives in Pending ASP — these are the primary bottleneck to portfolio throughput and to converting the five new Train Testing items into production
Provide direction on #43 to resume execution and exit On Hold status
Reschedule and address the overdue milestones on #15 (Alinhamento dos Ambientes, Prod due 30/06/2025) and #23 (Train Testing originally due 28/04/2026)
Opus 4.7 Adaptive
